official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the Play clientbound open_book packet fixture.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound open_book packet body codec.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official InteractionHand enum value accepted by the STREAM_CODEC; no item, inventory, or screen state is required.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound open_book packet framing and dispatch/decode for one InteractionHand fixture only; do not infer held item, book UI behavior, inventory state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
